title: CIE Task Dispatch Payload
description: Schema for the task dispatch payload assembled and validated by the Orchestrator for each DAG node execution. Conforms to orchestrator.yaml task_dispatch_loop cycle_steps 3–6 and spec/permissions.yaml token_lifecycle.

task_id.description: Unique identifier for this task dispatch instance.

execution_id.description: Parent execution context. Bound to capability_token.

workflow_instance_id.description: Workflow instance this task belongs to.

node_id.description: DAG node identifier from workflow definition. e.g. 'validate_dataset', 'generate_r_script'.

target_agent_id.description: Agent receiving this task. Must match agent_id in agents/ and permissions.yaml matrix.

created_at.description: UTC timestamp when the Orchestrator assembled this task.

CapabilityToken.description: Ephemeral Cryptographic Capability Token (CCT). Conforms to spec/permissions.yaml token_lifecycle. Expires after 300 seconds or node completion, whichever comes first.

granted_scopes.description: Permission scopes granted. Must be a subset of agent's allow list in permissions.yaml.

expires_at.description: Hard expiry. Maximum 300 seconds after issued_at per spec/permissions.yaml.

revoked.description: Set to true immediately upon node completion or failure.

TaskInputPayload.description: Isolated context payload assembled by the Orchestrator. Contains only fields required for the target node. Conforms to orchestrator.yaml cycle_step 4: inject_only.

schema_ref.description: Schema URI validating the data payload. e.g. 'cie://schemas/dataset.schema.json'.

data.description: Node-specific input fields. Validated against schema_ref before dispatch.

context_artifacts.description: References to upstream artifact outputs required by this node.

RetryContext.description: Present only when this task is a retry. Conforms to spec/workflow.yaml failure_policy.

attempt_number.description: Current attempt number. 1 = original dispatch (no RetryContext). 2+ = retry.

failure_reason.description: Must be a recoverable failure type per spec/workflow.yaml failure_policy.recoverable.

previous_task_id.description: task_id of the previous failed attempt for audit traceability.

backoff_delay_ms.description: Exponential backoff delay applied before this retry.
